summary: Verified two bug fixes: 1) Photographer Heart icon now navigates to /impacted (Impact Dashboard) instead of opening StokedDrawer, 2) Admin Map Editor now loads all 1447 spots (limit increased from 200 to 5000). Both fixes working correctly.

minor.issue: 404 errors in console - likely expected for users without bookings

critical_code_review_comments: TopNav.js line 210: Conditional navigation working correctly - isPhotographer ? navigate('/impacted') : setStokedOpen(true)
AdminSpotEditor.js line 163: fetchSpots now requests limit=5000 to get all spots
spot_admin.py line 130: Backend limit constraint changed from le=200 to le=5000
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Photographer Heart icon navigates to /impacted, Surfer Heart icon opens StokedDrawer. 2) Admin Map Editor loads 1447 spots (all spots). The isPhotographer check in TopNav.js includes roles: Hobbyist, Photographer, Approved Pro.

photographer_heart_icon_navigation.details: Photographer (test_photographer_221@test.com) clicking Heart icon navigates to /impacted route, ImpactDashboard renders correctly

surfer_heart_icon_behavior.details: Surfer (testuser_e1@test.com) clicking Gear icon opens StokedDrawer (Surf Credits), stays on /feed

admin_map_editor_spots_count.details: Admin Map Editor shows 1447 spots (verified via UI badge and API response)
